obligations: 6% royalty + 5% ad fund + technology fees via ACH
restrictions: Only designated suppliers for 80-85% of ongoing purchases
Must use designated POS, payment processing, and network providers

obligations: No financing from GC. Self-fund or arrange third-party financing
rights: GC may guarantee leases ($1,500 fee). SBA streamlined lending via Franchise Registry

obligations: Complete QuickConnect (49.56 hrs classroom + 13 hrs OJT) within 180 days
All brand-delivery personnel complete Academy within 30 days
Pay all wages and travel for staff training
restrictions: Must honor all customer-facing technology GC develops
Must maintain internet at GC-designated speed

obligations: Operate at approved Authorized Location only
restrictions: 3/4-mile protected area (1/10 mile dense). Non-Traditional Locations excluded. No alternative distribution channels without consent. No internet/telemarketing solicitation
rights: No minimum sales quota. Rights maintained during term regardless of population changes. MDA provides Exclusive DMA during compliance

obligations: Use Marks only as prescribed by GC. Notify GC of infringement. Cooperate in trademark litigation
restrictions: No Marks in corporate name, domain name, social media. No modifications to Marks. GC may change Marks at franchisee expense

obligations: Maintain confidentiality of all proprietary information. Ensure employee compliance
restrictions: No use of confidential info for ML/AI/generative AI without written consent. Must opt out of AI platform data usage

obligations: Devote best efforts via Designated Operator. Attend co-op meetings. Comply with Code of Ethics. Staff with qualified, competent employees
restrictions: No independent contractors for staffing. Must identify as independent operator in all dealings
triggers: Personal guaranty from every equity holder. Spousal noncompete. Must complete all training

obligations: Offer full range of required services and inventory
restrictions: Confined to haircare/grooming. No other business at salon location. GC may add/change/discontinue services at franchisee expense without limit
